To then documenting the standard operating procedures, to then streamlining those standard operating procedures while baking in a lot of expertise, what we quickly realized is the business we're really in is the business of building the engine that makes it easier to build, run, maintain, and learn from this layer, which is the workflows.

So essentially what we build underneath the hood, a lot of people don't know, it's just like essentially an AI decoding agent that builds workflows along with experts, and then a runtime layer that runs that at a massive scale, like thousands and thousands of things in parallel, an ability layer, and now I run a learning engine that is going to learn from every run.
And then now we're also building a task hub that can orchestrate the steps as well, like, you know, with a network of people.
